| [JOS-P01](JOS-P01-trust-and-graduated-autonomy.md) | Trust & Graduated Autonomy | adopt | required | Ensure that autonomy is always earned through demonstrated competence, never assumed. |

| [JOS-P10](JOS-P10-deliberate-creation.md) | Deliberate Creation | adopt | expected | Ensure creating persistent entities always requires structured thought, never silent inheritance. |

| [JOS-P22](JOS-P22-ubiquitous-language.md) | Ubiquitous Language | adopt | required | Ensure every term has exactly one meaning system-wide, eliminating ambiguity as a source of organizational failure. |
